generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor providing the current I_M signal from the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentStream
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor‑mounted position encoder providing joint angle and encoder tick counts"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleStream, MotorTickCountStream
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox‑mounted position encoder providing gearbox joint angle and tick counts"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleStream, GearboxTickCountStream
]

instance DerivedTorqueDataGenerator : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived‑data generator computing joint torque from the measured current and motor parameters"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DerivedTorqueStream
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityDataGenerator : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived‑data generator computing angular velocity from position and velocity signals"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DerivedAngularVelocityStream
]

instance SimulationOutputGenerator : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Simulated data generator producing model outputs such as torque and angular velocity from Simulink models"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulatedTorqueStream, SimulatedAngularVelocityStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorCurrentStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorAngleStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxAngleStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorTickCountStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxTickCountStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance DerivedTorqueStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DerivedTorqueDataGenerator
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DerivedAngularVelocityDataGenerator
]

instance SimulatedTorqueStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulationOutputGenerator
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulationOutputGenerator
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current data stream"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTTransport
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentStream
]

instance MeasuredMotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor joint angle data stream"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTTransport
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleStream
]

instance MeasuredGearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox joint angle data stream"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTTransport
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleStream
]

instance MeasuredMotorTickCountData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor encoder tick count data stream"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTTransport
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorTickCountStream
]

instance MeasuredGearboxTickCountData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox encoder tick count data stream"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTTransport
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxTickCountStream
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured joint torque data stream derived from current"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTTransport
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueStream
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity data stream derived from velocity signals"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTTransport
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAngularVelocityStream
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque data stream from Simulink models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTTransport
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedTorqueStream
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity data stream from Simulink models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTTransport
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedAngularVelocityStream
]

// Engineering and simulation models
instance MotorModelSysML : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML structural model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor and its internal components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance GearboxModelSysML : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML structural model of the two‑stage gearbox (gearwheel + cycloidal)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance CycloidalModelSysML : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML model of the cycloidal gear stage within the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance TorqueCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data‑calculation model for generating torque from current using Coulomb‑Viscous equations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponent
]

instance MotorSimulink : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance GearboxSimulink : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the gearwheel‑stage gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance CycloidalSimulink : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the cycloidal gearing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SystemSimulink : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Complete system‑level Simulink model combining motor, gearbox, cycloidal gear and encoder dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for creating and editing structural and behavioral models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelingService
]

instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulink for executable simulation of dynamics and friction equations"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulinkSimulationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for asset identification and semantic linking"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetLinkingService
]

instance MQTTTransport : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for live data transport from the physical robot to the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransportService
]

instance DashboardUI : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization dashboard UI for monitoring the twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance CPPInterface : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ interface for ingesting sensor data into the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables CPPDataIngestionService
]

instance JavaInterface : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java interface for ingesting sensor data into the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables JavaDataIngestionService
]

instance ProcessingComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing component executing data‑calculation and simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousIdentificationService, SimulationService, DataComparisonService, ParameterProvisionService
]

// C6: Services
instance SysMLModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing SysML model creation and upkeep"
    DTDFVocab:provides SysMLModelInsight
]

instance SimulinkSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing Simulink simulations of motor, gearbox, and system models"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationModelInsight
]

instance AssetLinkingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service linking physical assets with their semantic AAS representations"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetLinkingInsight
]

instance DataTransportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling MQTT based transport of live sensor and simulation data"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransportInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real‑time visualization of measured and simulated data on the dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDashboardInsight
]

instance CPPDataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "C++ based data ingestion service for processing incoming data streams"
    DTDFVocab:provides CPPDataInsight
]

instance JavaDataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Java based data ingestion service for processing incoming data streams"
    DTDFVocab:provides JavaDataInsight
]

instance ContinuousIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing continuous friction parameter estimation from live data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterEstimateInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service running simulations to generate predicted torque and velocity traces"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulatedDataInsight
]

instance DataComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service comparing measured and simulated torque and velocity traces"
    DTDFVocab:provides DiscrepancyHighlightInsight, WearChangeDetectionInsight
]

instance ParameterProvisionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing friction‑parameter estimates to improve robot control accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControllerAdjustmentInsight, MaintenancePlanningInsight, FrictionCompensationRedesignInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight showing real‑time visual comparison of measured vs simulated data on the dashboard"
]

instance FrictionParameterEstimateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that friction-parameter estimates are updated continuously from live data"
]

instance WearChangeDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating changes in wear based on discrepancies in torque and velocity trends"
]

instance DiscrepancyHighlightInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight highlighting discrepancies between expected and measured joint behavior"
]

instance ControllerAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight recommending adjustments to motor controller settings based on updated friction parameters"
]

instance MaintenancePlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight informing maintenance scheduling derived from wear detection"
]

instance FrictionCompensationRedesignInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight suggesting redesign of friction compensation strategies when persistent discrepancies are detected"
]

instance ControllerAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic action to adjust controller gains or parameters based on friction-parameter estimates"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenancePlanningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to trigger scheduled maintenance when wear thresholds are exceeded"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance FrictionCompensationRedesignAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to propose a redesign of friction compensation when persistent model errors occur"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// Auxiliary insights for enablers
instance SysMLModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming structural and behavioral model updates in SysML"
]

instance SimulationModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming successful execution of Simulink simulation models"
]

instance AssetLinkingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight verifying semantic linkage between physical assets and AAS"
]

instance DataTransportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming successful MQTT data transport"
]

instance CPPDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight verifying C++ data ingestion"
]

instance JavaDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight verifying Java data ingestion"
]

instance SimulatedDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight verifying generation of simulated torque and velocity traces"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time operation; data updates are synchronized with the robot’s sensor update cycle and forwarded to the digital shadow at the same sampling rate as the embedded sensors (typically 100 Hz). The processing and visualization pipeline introduces negligible latency, enabling dynamic friction parameter adaptation during runtime."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A single digital twin instance for the first robot axis that integrates the engineering model, simulation models (motor, gearbox, system), data‑calculation models, processing component, data traces, and a visualization dashboard. The constellation orchestrates data ingestion, model execution, trace generation, and live display."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated (runtime) stage – continuous observation and model adaptation based on live data from the manufactured asset. The digital shadow does not cover the designed or ideal stage beyond the simulation of the theoretical frictionless model."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model deviations between measured and simulated torque/velocity traces are continuously monitored; data derivation is traceable through the DSRM 'originatesFrom' associations; simulation models are parameterised with manufacturer data and updated based on live identification, reducing modeling error. Uncertainty sources include load, temperature, and wear; verification is performed by comparing simulated frictionless behavior with measured friction; validation against live data ensures model accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "One‑way, automated data flow from PT to DT via MQTT. Asset Administration Shells provide semantic grounding; processing component consumes data traces. DT does not send data back to PT (digital shadow)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adopts the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for semantic asset representation; SysML (v1.7 or 2.0) for system engineering models; Simulink for simulation models; MQTT as a lightweight publish/subscribe protocol for data transport."
]
